name: testimonials-01
title: Testimonials
author: Toby Belhome
description: Highlight customer experiences and build trust with elegantly designed Tailwind CSS testimonial sections. These layouts feature user quotes, ratings, and profile visuals to create social proof. Ideal for SaaS platforms, product pages, and service websites aiming to showcase credibility and strengthen user confidence.
